full_text:
Cao Mao (Yanshi) 曹髦 (彥士)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Mao (曹髦), styledYanshi (彥士). Grandson of Cao Pi. Was made Emperor after Cao Fang’s abdication by Sima Shi. Cao Mao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Mao lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
